title: oxys vulgaris
intro: Oxys vulgaris, also known as common oxeye daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant contains medicinal properties, including sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of oxys vulgaris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Oxys vulgaris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being.
